source: RuboCop, Ruby Style Guide, OWASP Ruby

rules.name: console-output
rules.message: puts/p/pp — use a structured logger (SemanticLogger, Logger) instead.
rules.fix_hint: Replace with logger.info/debug/warn from SemanticLogger or Rails.logger.

rules.name: hardcoded-credentials
rules.fix_hint: Move secrets to environment variables; load via ENV['KEY'] or Rails credentials.

rules.name: code-execution
rules.message: Dynamic code execution — risks arbitrary code execution.
rules.fix_hint: Replace with define_method, send, or a dispatch hash for safe dynamic behavior.

rules.name: rescue-exception
rules.message: rescue Exception — catches SignalException, SystemExit, and NoMemoryError.
rules.fix_hint: Rescue StandardError or specific exception types instead.

rules.name: rescue-nil
rules.message: Silent rescue — swallows all errors without handling.
rules.fix_hint: Name the exception class and at minimum log the error.

rules.name: global-variable
rules.message: Global variable assignment — creates invisible coupling between modules.
rules.fix_hint: Use dependency injection, configuration objects, or module-level constants.

rules.name: deep-nesting
rules.message: Deep nesting detected (4+ indent levels with 2-space indent) — reduces readability.
rules.fix_hint: Extract inner logic into named methods or use guard clauses (return unless).

rules.name: magic-numbers
rules.message: Magic number in comparison — extract to a named constant for clarity.
rules.fix_hint: Define a UPPER_SNAKE_CASE constant with a descriptive name.

rules.name: empty-rescue
rules.message: Empty rescue block silently swallows exceptions.
rules.fix_hint: Log the error, reraise, or add a comment explaining why it is intentionally ignored.

rules.name: api-key-exposure
rules.message: Possible API key or access token in source code
rules.fix_hint: Move to environment variables or a secrets vault. Never commit secrets.

rules.name: private-key-block
rules.message: Private key detected in source code
rules.fix_hint: Remove private key from source. Use key management service or environment variable.

rules.name: connection-string-credentials
rules.message: Connection string with embedded credentials detected
rules.fix_hint: Use environment variables for connection strings. Never embed passwords in URIs.

rules.name: email-in-source
rules.message: Email address detected in source — verify this is not PII
rules.fix_hint: If this is a real email address, consider moving to configuration. Test fixtures should use @example.com.
